prompt: Run payroll for Sarah Brown (sarah.brown@example.org) for this month. The base salary is 48300 NOK. Add a one-time bonus of 11650 NOK on top of the base salary. If the salary API is unavailable, you can use manual vouchers on salary accounts (5000-series) to record the payroll expense.
result: Ran payroll for employee Sarah Brown (2026-03). salary transaction id=6958174. monthly salary=48300. bonus=11650
